review.workflowSummary: The user navigates to the NodeRoom landing page, enters the display name 'Founder', and clicks 'Create blank room'. Upon entering the blank room, the user clicks '+ Add a blank sheet' which successfully initializes a blank spreadsheet on the canvas.
review.workflowGoal: Create a new blank room and initialize a blank spreadsheet.
review.completionEvidence: A blank spreadsheet with rows r1-r8 and columns A-C is successfully created and displayed on the canvas at 00:09.

timeline.event: User enters display name 'Founder' and clicks 'Create blank room'.
Blank room successfully loads with initialization options.
User clicks '+ Add a blank sheet'.
Blank spreadsheet is added to the canvas.

freshRoomState.detail: The room was completely blank upon creation, showing the 'This room is blank' placeholder screen.

agentStoppedAtBudget.detail: No agent workflow was executed, so no budget or token limits were reached.

roomTooCrowded.detail: The interface is clean and well-structured, with a clear separation between the main canvas, sidebar, and status bar.

tooManyButtons.detail: There are quite a few controls and status indicators visible simultaneously (e.g., Auto-allow toggle, layout toggles, chat tabs, handoff controls, and bottom status indicators) which might feel slightly complex for a first-time user.

visibleButtons: Ask the agent to build something

recommendations.fix: Consider hiding advanced status indicators (like Sourced, Review, Eval, Cost) or collapsing them into an expandable status bar until an agent is actively running.
